$comment: Office-scoped agent discovery. The global US/EU default Foundry projects (env vars AZURE_AI_FOUNDRY_RESOURCE_ID_US/EU) are ALWAYS shown as 'US Region Agents' or 'EU Region Agents'. Add an entry here only when an office has ADDITIONAL Foundry projects beyond the regional default — those will show as a separate '{Office Name} Agents' section. To add your office: open a PR adding an entry here and an env var with your project's ARM resource ID.

$schema.displayName: Shown in the UI as a section header in the Agents tab
$schema.emailDomains: Email domains that match users to this office (most specific match wins)
$schema.region: 'US' or 'EU' — controls GDPR data residency routing
$schema.foundryProjectsEnv: Names of env vars holding comma-separated ARM resource paths to your office's additional Foundry projects (beyond the regional default)
